<!-- Adding a quest to the Golden Grace market -->

## New quest(s)

- **Name(s):**
- **Category:**
- **Folder(s):** `quests/<id>/`

## Checklist

- [ ] Created `quests/<id>/` with `quest.json` + `description.md` (or `.html`)
- [ ] Added a matching summary to `catalog.json`; `id` matches the folder name
- [ ] `id` is unique and kebab-case
- [ ] `stats` only use: vitality / fitness / wealth / social / grooming
- [ ] `icon` is a real SF Symbol (or omitted)
- [ ] `times` are 24h `"HH:mm"` (or omitted for an anytime quest)
- [ ] `notesFormat` set to `html` if the description is `description.html`
- [ ] Ran the JSON + structure checks from CONTRIBUTING.md
